title: Festive Mashup Concept Update
description: The Festive Mashup pack from console updated to the latest versions
body:
![Festive Continued](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b63d529c02923e6489a25a61eeb76bded181425_0.webp)
# Festive Mashup Concept Update

Festive Mashup Concept Update is a resource pack that changes the new blocks, items, and some mobs as a concept of what if the Festive Mashup pack kept updating past 1.19. This pack is intended to be used as an overlay for the [Festive Mashup](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/festive-mash-up) Resource Pack, and won't work properly without it



## Thanks to:

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

**Pigzone00:** For helping to choose and create the license, description, icon, tags, links, changelog and the resourcepack.

**SnowyBoi64** and **PrattProPlaysMC:** For helping to create the block textures.

**BrandonItaly:** For porting the original festive resource pack to Java.

</details>
